title: Enforce model authority by disabling local MLB trade origination in production
objective: Take the smallest safe first step toward the required authority model by removing sports_bot_v2 local MLB trade origination from production entry flow while keeping bridge/execution protections intact.
acceptance_criteria: sports_bot_v2 no longer originates MLB trade decisions in production mode
result clearly explains what authority violation was removed
rollback: Revert the narrow bot_core.py authority gate change to restore old local origination behavior.
